subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou beholdest my condition, and witnesseth my tribulations, and hearkeneth unto my call and my lamentation, and the sighs of my burning heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تشاهد حالی و تنظر بلائی و تسمع نداای و ضجیجی و زفرات اجیج نیران
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
